name: measured-space
description: Authenticated dashboard for assigned cloud-hosted virtual tours.

scripts.check: npm run build && node --check server.mjs && node --check functions/_shared/auth.js && node --check functions/_shared/http.js && node --check functions/api/me.js && node --check functions/api/tours.js && node --check scripts/prepare-tour.mjs && node --check scripts/build-tour-catalog.mjs && node --check scripts/publish-tour-r2.mjs && node --check scripts/check-hosted-tour.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-tour-catalog.mjs && node --check scripts/production-check.mjs && node --check scripts/release-tour.mjs && node --check scripts/lib/dashboard-d1.mjs && node --check scripts/import-tour-to-d1.mjs && node --check scripts/assign-tour.mjs && node --check scripts/list-dashboard-tours.mjs && npm run validate-catalog -- --allow-example
scripts.d1:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply measured-space-dashboard --local
scripts.d1:migrate:remote: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply measured-space-dashboard --remote
scripts.deploy:pages: npm run check && npm run production-check && npx wrangler pages deploy public
